calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CRESCENT BANK & TRUST'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - This motion is off calendar as moot. The default judgment was set aside on August 28, 2013. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymund Burke, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael Heath, Tel. 415.931.4207, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT MAHDI ABDALJALEEL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted. No opposition filed. The default and default judgment entered in the case are set aside. Order signed. Defendant must file the proposed answer to complaint submitted with the moving papers within 5 days after entry of this order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
